name: Carrot Top
bio: Carrot Top, the stage name of Scott Thompson, is an American stand-up comedian known for prop comedy, pulling dozens of homemade gag props from trunks onstage and delivering rapid one-liner explanations. He broke through in the early 1990s on Comic Strip Live and Star Search and built one of the Las Vegas Strips longest-running comedy residencies, headlining at the Luxor since 2005.

timeline.ev: Big break on Comic Strip Live
Begins long-running Luxor Las Vegas residency

accolades: Long-running headline comedy residency at the Luxor, Las Vegas (since 2005)
